subject: FW: just checking
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com] 
Sent: Saturday, December 08, 2007 12:42 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: just checking


Dear Lesley,

Please ask Jeffrey if he would like to see me before the end of the
year, as I will probably have to schedule a time to meet within the next
week or so. If not, please just give him my best. 

Cheers, 
Laura
